payload.description:
## Summary
Inspect `ScorecardExampleItem`, current dashboard flows, and ownership semantics to define how existing examples can serve as the curated source pool.

## Deliverables
- Document the current scorecard-vs-score ownership behavior.
- Resolve the ambiguity in how examples are currently used.
- Produce the exact contract for examples as a curated source pool for deterministic reference datasets.
payload.title: Audit existing examples schema and behavior for reuse as curated source pool
